## Space Marine Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Lone Primaris Marine (Cost: 4 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Lone Primaris Marine | 7”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Lone Primaris Marine is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Rifle, Frag Grenades, a Chain Blade, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Rifle.** 30”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL  
* **Frag Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Lone Primaris Marine treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Last Survivor.** When rolling for casualties, the Lone Primaris Marine is only a casualty on a result of 1\. If promoted to Elite, it instead rolls twice when rolling on the Elite Trauma table, choosing one of the results.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES

#### 0-1 Primaris Minelayer (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only an Adeptus Astartes Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Primaris Minelayer | 7”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Primaris Minelayer is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Carbine, a Close Combat Weapon, an Augury Scanner, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Carbine.** 18”, VICIOUS 11, ASSAULT, CRITICAL, Scope  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Augury Scanner.** Enemy models must be set up at least 16” away from this model when using the DEEP STRIKE or INFILTRATOR Keywords.  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Primaris Minelayer treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Omni-Scrambler.** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll, choose one enemy the Infiltrator Saboteur can see within 12” that has not activated this Turn. Your opponent cannot activate that model until they have activated D3 other models, or until it is the last left to activate this Turn.  
* **Plant Explosives.** As an Action with a Success Roll with \+2 DICE, the Primaris Minelayer can mine a piece of terrain they alone are touching, no bigger than 8” x 8” (an 8” section of trench, a wall, a tree, a building etc). If successful, the terrain piece is now MINED.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, INFILTRATOR, NEGATE MINED, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Techmarine (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only an Adeptus Astartes or Adeptus Mechanicus Imperium Warband can take this Mercenary. A Heretic Astartes (Renegade Space Marines) Outlaw Warband can also take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Techmarine | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Techmarine is equipped with Power Armour, a Servo Claw, an Omnissian Axe, a Boltgun, a Grav Pistol, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Boltgun.** 24”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL  
* **Grav Pistol.** 12”, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, PISTOL, STUN  
* **Omnissian Axe.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED  
* **Servo Claw.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Techmarine treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Blessing of the Omnissiah.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Techmarine can attempt to repair itself or a friendly MECHANICUS, ARTIFICIAL, or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.  
* **Mechadendrites.** The Techmarine can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Melee or Shoot Action, without off-hand penalties.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, ELITE, CONTROLLER, MECHANICUS

### Chapter Marines

You can recruit only a maximum of 1 of the following mercenaries.

#### 0-1 Black Templar Crusader (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (Black Templar), Adeptus Mechanicus, or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squad Prospectors) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Black Templar Crusader | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Black Templar Crusader is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Pistol, Krak Grenades, a Power Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Krak Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Black Templar Crusader treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Bladeguard.** The Black Templar Crusader rolls 2D6 to determine its Charge distance instead of 1D6, taking the highest result.  
* **Templar Vows.** At the start of each battle, choose one of the following Vows. That Vow’s benefits and drawbacks apply to the Black Templar Crusader until the end of the battle.  
  * **Suffer Not the Unclean to Live.** The model has \+1 INJURY DICE with melee attack against non-ARTIFICIAL non-VEHICLE enemies during an Activation in which it Charged. However, whenever the model Charges, it must charge the closest possible enemy model it can see even if the actual route to reach it is longer than to reach another.  
  * **Uphold the Honour of the Emperor.** Injury rolls against the model have \-1 DICE, but attack Success Rolls made against it have \+1 DICE.  
  * **Abhor the Witch, Destroy the Witch.** The model has \+1 INJURY DICE PSYKER enemies with melee attack, and has \+2” movement so long as it moves in the most direct path towards an enemy PSYKER (it can avoid Difficult and Dangerous terrain). However, while an enemy PSYKER is within 8” of the model, the model has \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls besides melee attacks.  
  * **Accept Any Challenge, No Matter the Odds.** The model's melee attacks gain ARMOUR PIERCING 1 on a Critical Hit. However, the model cannot Retreat.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES

#### 0-1 Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (Blood Angels) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard | 8”/Flying | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard is equipped with Power Armour, an Inferno Pistol, Frag Grenades, a Power Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Inferno Pistol.** 6”, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY, PISTOL  
* **Frag Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Red Thirst.** During an Activation in which it Charged, the Blood Angels Sanguinary Guard has \+1 INJURY DICE with melee attacks made against a target with 1 or more BLOOD MARKERS.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, FLYING, SKIRMISHER

#### 0-1 Dark Angel Knight (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (Dark Angels), Adeptus Mechanicus, or Necromunda Gang (Ironhead Squad Prospectors) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Dark Angel Knight | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+3 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Dark Angel Knight is equipped with Terminator Armour, a Heavy Shield, Frag Grenades, a Power Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Heavy Shield.** Injury rolls are made at \-1 DICE against a model holding a heavy shield, HELD, counts as a Shield, including for Shield Combo.  
* **Frag Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Dark Angel Knight treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Terminator Armour.** The Dark Angel Knight can wield a TWO-HANDED ranged weapon in one hand instead of a TWO-HANDED melee weapon due to its STRONG Keyword. Due to the bulk of its armour, the Dark Angel Knight rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, DEEP STRIKE, STRONG

#### 0-1 Deathwatch Veteran (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only an Adeptus Astartes (non-Deathwatch) Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Deathwatch Veteran | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Deathwatch Veteran is equipped with Power Armour, a Boltgun, a Xenophase Sword, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Boltgun.** 24”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, Scope  
* **Xenophase Sword.** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, CRITICAL  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

When you recruit the Deathwatch Veteran, you must choose two ammo types for its Special Issue Ammunition ability. It cannot use any of the other options.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Deathwatch Veteran treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Special Issue Ammunition.** At the start of each battle, choose two of the following ammunition types. Once during each of its Activations, when the Deathwatch Veteran attacks with its Boltgun, it can choose one of the two ammo types you chose.  
  * **Derevenant Shells.** On a hit, after the normal Injury roll, the target must roll on the Injury table again with \-2 DICE. Other properties of the weapon do not apply during this injury roll.  
  * **Dragonfire Bolts.** Attack gains the FIRE Keyword.  
  * **Hellfire Rounds.** Attack gains the GAS Keyword.  
  * **Inertial Fusion Bolts.** Injury rolls caused by the attack cannot be modified by \-DICE.  
  * **Kraken Bolts.** Attacks gain ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * **Metal Storm Shells.** Attack gains the SHRAPNEL Keyword.  
  * **Tempest Bolts.** Attack has \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with the ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE Keyword.  
  * **Thermic Acceleration Rounds.** Attack ignores all penalties to Hit besides Cover, Long Range, and BLOOD MARKERS (including INFECTION and STUN), as well as penalties or limits to their range.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, INQUISITION

#### 0-1 Grey Knight Paladin (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (Grey Knights) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grey Knight Paladin | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+3 | \-3 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Grey Knight Paladin is equipped with Terminator Armour, a Heavy Psycannon, a Heavy Force Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Heavy Psycannon.** 24”, VICIOUS 11, \+1 INJURY DICE, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, CRITICAL, HEAVY, PSYCHIC, TWO-HANDED  
* **Heavy Force Weapon.** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, HEAVY, PSYCHIC, TWO-HANDED, HELD.  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

The Grey Knight Paladin knows the following Psychic Powers:

* **Armoured Resilience (Effect).** No Range, Self, End of Turn, the first \-2 of the caster’s Armour (including shields) has IMPERVIOUS.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Grey Knight Paladin treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Terminator Armour.** Grey Knight Paladin can wield a TWO-HANDED ranged weapon in one hand instead of a TWO-HANDED melee weapon due to its STRONG Keyword. Due to the bulk of its armour, the Grey Knight Paladin rolls only a D3 for extra charge distance instead of a D6.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, DEEP STRIKE, PSYKER 1, STRONG

#### 0-1 Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes Warband (Imperial Fists) cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner is equipped with Power Armour, a Missile Launcher, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Missile Launcher.** 36”, IGNORE COVER, HEAVY  
  * Frag: BLAST 3”, SHRAPNEL  
  * Krak: ARMOUR PIERCING 2  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Architect of War.** \-1 of the Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner’s Armour has IMPERVIOUS.  
* **Black Carapace.** The Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Devastator.** The Imperial Fist Heavy Gunner ignores the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon it carries.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES

#### 0-1 Iron Hands Heavy Gunner (Cost: 5 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes Warband (Iron Hands) cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Iron Hands Heavy Gunner | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Iron Hands Heavy Gunner is equipped with Power Armour, a Heavy Bolter, a Close Combat Weapon, a Combat Helmet, Ocular Cyberteknika. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Heavy Bolter.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.  
* **Ocular Cyberteknika.** The model ignores the penalty for shooting at Long Range. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Insomniac, Lost an Eye.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Iron Hands Heavy Gunner treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Devastator.** The Iron Hands Heavy Gunner ignores the HEAVY Keyword of one ranged weapon it carries.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES

#### 0-1 Salamander Promethean (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (Salamanders) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Salamander Promethean | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Salamander Promethean is equipped with Power Armour, a Melta Gun, Incendiary Grenades, a Chain Blade, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Combat Helmet. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Melta Gun.** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, RISKY  
* **Incendiary Grenades.** 8”, IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical, ASSAULT, FIRE, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Combat Helmet.** The model has NEGATE SHRAPNEL.

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The Salamander Promethean treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, NEGATE FIRE

#### 0-1 Space Wolves Wulfen (Cost: 4 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Wulfen | 8”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Space Wolves Wulfen must be equipped with Standard Armour, a Stormfrag Auto-Launcher, and Wulfen Frost Claws.

* **Stormfrag Auto-Launcher.** 12”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL, takes no hands  
* **Wulfen Frost Claws.** Melee, CRITICAL, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, IGNORE OFF-HAND, comes as a pair of two weapons.

**Abilities**

* **Savage Frenzy.** When an enemy in close combat with the Wulfen Retreats, the Wulfen has \+1 DICE to Hit and \+1 INJURY DICE for its free attack against that model.  
* **Wulfen Howl.** The Wulfen and any of its allies within 12” of it roll 2D6 instead of 1D6 when determining their Charge distance, taking the highest result.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, BEAST, LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG

#### 0-1 White Scars Outrider (Cost: 6 Glory)

An Adeptus Astartes (White Scars) Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| White Scats Outrider | 10”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-2 | 60 x 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
The White Scars Outrider is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Pistol, and a Chain Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Twin Boltgun.** 24”, \+1 DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL. This weapon can be used alongside any other ranged weapon when the rider takes the Shoot Action.  
* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY

**Abilities**

* **Black Carapace.** The White Scars Outrider treats any Down result from the Injury Roll Table as a Minor Hits instead. This does not apply to Down results that already replaced another result, such as with TOUGH.  
* **Turbo Boost.** The White Scars Outrider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.

**Keywords**  
ASTARTES, LARGE, VEHICLE
